case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. MICHAEL GILLIS

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT GILLIS, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2018
